title: telemetry — trait composition
description: Two owned traits, one per signal group. `Traceable` for classes that expose a helper to start/stop a manual span without touching the OTel SDK. `StructuredLog` for classes that want an ergonomic `$this->log()` helper. Both attributes remain the primary API; the traits cover escape hatches.

owned.description: Adds a `withSpan(string $name, callable $fn, array $attributes = [])` helper that starts a span, executes the callable, records exception on throw, and ends the span. Also exposes `currentSpan()` for reading the active span.

Adds `log(): LoggerInterface`, `logInfo(string $msg, array $context = [])`, `logWarning(...)`, `logError(...)`, `logException(\Throwable $e, array $context = [])`. Resolves the correct channel via #[AsLogChannel] class attribute or falls back to config('telemetry.logs.default_channel').

keepsuit.description: Facade over the OTel Tracer. Used inside our attribute discoverers + span helpers.
Facade over the OTel Meter for counters, histograms, gauges.

composition.note: This module owns no entities. Traits here are helpers for other modules opting into imperative instrumentation OR ergonomic logging.
